topPlaces.name: Ghumli
topPlaces.description: Ghumli is a village located 45 km from Jamkhambhaliya, at foothills of Barda, in Devbhumi Dwarka district of Gujarat, India.

topPlaces.name: Bhanvad
topPlaces.description: Bhanvad is a city and a municipality in Devbhoomi Dwarka district in the state of Gujarat, India.

topPlaces.name: Barda Wildlife Sanctuary
topPlaces.description: Barda Wildlife Sanctuary is located in Gujarat, India. It is situated approximately 31 kilometres (19 mi) from Ranavav, 49 kilometres (30 mi) from Porbandar and 100 kilometres (62 mi) west of Gir Forest National Park.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Navlakha Temple, Ghumli?
faq.a: The best time to visit Navlakha Temple, Ghumli is Oct – Mar. Summers are 28–44°C and winters are 8–25°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Navlakha Temple, Ghumli?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Porbandar Airport (28 km) and the nearest railway station is Rajkot Junction (114 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Navlakha Temple, Ghumli?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Navlakha Temple, Ghumli at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Navlakha Temple, Ghumli?
faq.a: Stays in Navlakha Temple, Ghumli start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Navlakha Temple, Ghumli?
faq.a: The top attractions are Ghumli, Bhanvad, Barda Wildlife Sanctuary.
